title: Xtra Dense Syrian Chickpeas Wrap
description: A nutty and dense Syrian dish featuring shio-koji, leaf-wrap-steam, and served in a tagliere vessel, this recipe is low-fat-friendly and perfect for a snack or light meal.
instructions: Preheat the steamer to 200 degrees Fahrenheit.
Mix chickpeas, shio-koji, olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper in a bowl.
Place a large kale leaf on a flat surface and spoon about 1/2 cup of the chickpea mixture onto the center of the leaf.
Fold the stem end of the kale leaf over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the leaf into a tight cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining kale leaves and chickpea mixture.
Place the wrapped chickpea rolls in the steamer, seam-side down, and steam for 10 minutes.
Serve the wraps in a tagliere vessel, garnished with sumac if desired.
